plugins.name: agent-memory
plugins.description: GitHub-backed persistent memory for Claude Code. Syncs agent memory across machines via a private Git repository.

plugins.name: memory-bank
plugins.description: GCP-backed long-term memory for Claude Code. Fetches global and project-scoped facts from Vertex AI Reasoning Engine Memory Bank at session start; consolidates new facts at session end.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: OKF v0.1 knowledge bundle manager. Author, ingest, lint, query, and visualize Open Knowledge Format bundles. Implements the Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern with BigQuery and web ingest adapters.

plugins.name: active-skills
plugins.description: A curated set of agent skills for Claude Code and Antigravity. Mirrored from mlarkin00/active-skills (the authoring source of truth).

plugins.name: skill-usage
plugins.description: Counts how often each skill is invoked and commits the totals to a git repo you choose. Runtime-agnostic; counts skills from every installed plugin.
